hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); for p in .env .env.local firestore.rules storage.rules; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p" ]]; then echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2; exit 2; fi; done
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.vue ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx vue-tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi

echo 'Reminders: Vue 3 Composition API + <script setup lang=ts> only. No enums (erasableSyntaxOnly). No ESLint — rely on vue-tsc strict. All tests are Playwright (E2E/CT/PWA). E2E needs Firebase emulators running.'
